title: More Mob Drops
description: A Mod that adds in more mob drops to mobs that don't drop anything upon death.
body:
This mod adds more mob drops to mobs and creatures that don't drop anything upon death.

This mod also doesn't have any custom items or blocks implemented since this mod only optimizes the use of mobs that don't drop anything upon death.

If you want to use this mod in your server or mod pack or even use it for youtube, the only thing you have to do is credit my mod by putting this mod link into your youtube video description and if you have a modded server then credit my mod somewhere in your server and if you have a mod pack with the mods you picked then credit my mod somewhere in your mod pack.

Have fun using my mod!


Also, some people will say that my mod can easily be made using data packs. But for me, I just want to make it as a mod to make it easier to implement.
